overall.description: A slow aerial drift through a dystopian cyberpunk industrial district at night, showcasing massive cooling towers with red warning lights and a brightly illuminated greenhouse-like facility. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog, orange sodium vapor lighting, and elevated highways with sparse traffic, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's visual aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cooling tower district with elevated transport infrastructure

agents.ego_description: slowly flying through the industrial district observing the massive cooling towers and infrastructure below

notable_agents.action: vehicle traveling along the elevated highway with visible headlights

entered.detail: Two massive concrete cooling towers with red aircraft warning lights on top, emitting thick smoke plumes
Multi-lane elevated roadway with orange sodium vapor street lighting
Large industrial structure with bright white translucent roofing glowing in the distance
Tall smokestacks emitting white smoke into the hazy night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a dystopian industrial district dominated by massive cooling towers on the left. The camera drifts forward over an elevated highway, revealing a brightly illuminated greenhouse-like structure in the distance. Sparse vehicle traffic moves along the highway below as orange street lights cast a warm glow through the foggy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: central industrial complex with illuminated greenhouse structures

events.description: camera descends slightly while maintaining forward trajectory, bringing the illuminated greenhouse structure into clearer view

agents.ego_description: continuing the aerial survey while descending toward the illuminated industrial complex

entered.detail: Network of large industrial pipes and conduits connecting buildings
Elevated metal walkways and platforms between industrial structures

segments.scene_description: As the camera descends slightly, the illuminated greenhouse complex becomes the dominant feature in the center of the frame. The cooling towers recede into the left background while industrial pipes and catwalks enter the scene on the right. The artificial lighting from the facility creates a stark contrast against the dark foggy surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense industrial processing area with ground-level infrastructure

agents.ego_description: flying past the main greenhouse structure while observing ground-level industrial activity

notable_agents.action: industrial transport vehicle moving along ground-level roads near the greenhouse facility

entered.detail: Green and orange safety lighting along ground-level pathways and machinery

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the greenhouse complex, which now begins to recede into the distance. Ground-level industrial lighting becomes visible on the right, revealing machinery and pathways. The elevated highway exits the frame as the perspective shifts to show more of the surrounding industrial buildings and distant smoke plumes rising into the hazy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial drift through a foggy industrial district that shifts from a wide view of cooling towers toward a detailed exploration of a glowing greenhouse complex. It begins by gliding over an elevated highway where orange street lights pierce the haze, with massive cooling towers looming to the left and a brightly illuminated facility appearing in the distance. As the camera descends, the greenhouse complex expands to dominate the center of the frame, causing the towers to recede while industrial pipes and catwalks emerge on the right. The scene then moves past the facility, allowing the artificial glow to fade into the background as the perspective shifts toward ground-level machinery and pathways. Finally, the highway exits the frame to reveal a broader expanse of industrial buildings and distant smoke plumes rising into the hazy night sky.
